Check Box1.label: [ ] A new clerk or registered agent (*see signature requirements on second page) or / [ ] A change to the existing clerk or registered agent information (**see signature requirements on second page)
Check Box1.binding_source: independent checkboxes (each on-state Yes) by geometry+text on page 0: Check Box1 y=337.5 = 'A new clerk or registered agent (*see signature requirements on second page) or'; Check Box2 y=361.6 = 'A change to the existing clerk or registered agent information (**see signature '. Replaces the migration-era text binding that fanned the literal enum string onto every box (non-boolean-key /Btn sweep; see tools/equivalence_check.py).
